Package javadraw

Class MultiRenderable

java.lang.Object
javadraw.MultiRenderable
All Implemented Interfaces:
CustomRenderable, DrawableObject, MultiRenderableMember
public class MultiRenderable extends Object implements DrawableObject, CustomRenderable, MultiRenderableMember

      public void move(Location location)

      Specified by:
